rulings.Case Title: THE VERLIS BROWN SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: The Will and Trust Contest was bifurcated from the Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust & Will and/or for Removal of Reginald B. Smith as Trustee, for an Accounting, and for Appointment of Successor Trustee. Judge Feinstein's 9/8/09 Decision After Court Trial is a final appealable order under Probate Code Section 1304(a) [on the bifurcated issue of the will and trust contest]. Request for Judicial Notice as to A) The Verliss Brown Smith Living Trust dated December 22, 2000 Denied B) Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust and Pourover Will and/or for Removal of Reginald B. Smith as Trustee Granted as to filing, denied as to contents C) Decision after Court Trial dated September 8, 2009 Granted D) Petition for Appointment of Special Administrator Granted as to filing, denied as to contents E) Order Appointing Barbara De Vries Special Administrator Granted Counsel are requested to call 551-3702 to advise whether they intend to appear to contest the tentative.
